title: pelargonium × colvillei
intro: Pelargonium × colvillei, also known as Mountain Rose or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium fulvum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce menstrual cramps and promote skin health. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × colvillei include tea, essential oil, and tincture, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
